rawIntent: pnpm build is not configured correclty. Fix

successCriteria.description: The pnpm build configuration is corrected and the build process completes successfully without errors.

constraints: Input validation: Validate all inputs at API boundaries before processing.
No sensitive data in logs: Never log passwords, tokens, PII, or financial data.
Error handling: No unhandled promise rejections. All async errors are caught and handled.
outOfScope: Everything outside the build configuration files.
